title: Urgent help needed to set up CRM on Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi Guys, We looking to hire an expert to set up our CRM and intergrate part of the CRM into our partner portal so that partner can also see the status of each lead. 
The CRM part should be fairly easy as we’re a mortgage…

posts.author: Tianjinwawa123 (David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys, We looking to hire an expert to set up our CRM and intergrate part of the CRM into our partner portal so that partner can also see the status of each lead.
The CRM part should be fairly easy as we’re a mortgage broking firm just need someoen to teach us how to make a good use of the system to help us grow. Please email me at zhe.xu90@gmail.com.
Thanks
David

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tianjinwawa123,

Thanks for reaching out to the monday.com community forums! I work with CarbonWeb and we are a referral partner with monday.com who have been working with companies to tailor their system component-by-component. It sounds like you’ve got great footing to start and I’d be happy to see how my team may be able to help. Feel free to grab some time with me here if you’d like to chat about it: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

640×640 61.4 KB

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @Tianjinwawa123 - I will reply here and also shoot you an email as requested. I’d love to chat with you about your CRM needs - we love working with mortgage brokers! We’ve built multiple CRMs for the mortgage broker industry and integrated various communication platforms, POS and LOS systems used by our brokerage clients. You can learn more about our work here: Mortgage Broker CRM with monday.com

Book a Consultation with us: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
CEO & Principal Consultant at Polished Geek

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tianjinwawa123

I’m interested and would like to assist you with.

Please check your email

posts.author: ShellyK (Shelly Katzir)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Tianjinwawa123, make sure to check out Moneylogz, it’ll enable you to track mortgage balances from financial accounts right on monday.com. Hope that helps

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tianjinwawa123

Welcome to the monday .com community!

If you are looking for an expert to integrate your CRM software with monday .com, I would recommend you seek help only from certified monday partners. There are many professionals that offer integration services, however, when you connect with certified monday partners for monday CRM integrations, they will set up your CRM on monday .com in minimal downtime with zero data loss. Once the integration is done, you can not only optimize the sales process but also enable the sales team to complete their tasks in a quick turnaround time with better efficiency.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
